name: thinkfeel-codex-dev-plugin
description: Codex developer setup automation for ThinkFeel projects.

interface.shortDescription: Set up ThinkFeel developer projects from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use ThinkFeel Codex Dev Plugin to configure local ThinkFeel projects from Codex, including secure Playground API key setup and ThinkFeel SDK environment variables.
defaultPrompt: Create a Playground API key for this project
Configure this ThinkFeel project for local development
